meta.description: Central bilingual (HE/EN) terminology catalog for Onyx Procurement — 6 domains, 200+ terms
meta.notes: Each term carries Hebrew (he), English (en), context (ctx), and a stable key. Use ctx to disambiguate homonyms (e.g. 'advance' vs 'advance tax').

payroll.ctx: Top-level domain: employee compensation, deductions, reporting

wage_slip.ctx: Monthly statement issued to employee per §24 Wage Protection Law

payslip_final.ctx: Locked, signed, non-editable payslip after approval

gross_pay.ctx: Total earnings before deductions — sum of base + benefits + overtime + bonuses

base_salary.ctx: Contractual monthly salary before bonuses and overtime

hourly_rate.ctx: For hourly employees — rate per regular working hour

monthly_pay.ctx: Payment cycle — used for salaried employees

minimum_wage.ctx: Statutory floor — updated periodically by Finance Ministry

average_wage.ctx: Used for Bituach Leumi ceiling calculations

ytd_gross.ctx: Cumulative gross from Jan 1 — used for progressive tax calculations (YTD)

ytd_tax.ctx: Cumulative income tax withheld from Jan 1

overtime_125.ctx: First two overtime hours per day — Hours of Work Law §16(1)

overtime_150.ctx: Third hour onwards per day — Hours of Work Law §16(2)

overtime_175.ctx: First two hours on rest day

overtime_200.ctx: Third hour onwards on rest day

night_shift.ctx: Hours between 22:00–06:00 — maximum 7 hours per shift by law

rest_day_premium.ctx: Additional 50% for work on Saturday/official rest day

holiday_premium.ctx: Extra pay for working on official holidays

deductions.ctx: All amounts withheld from gross — tax, BL, pension, etc.

mandatory_deductions.ctx: Legally required: income tax, BL, health insurance

income_tax.ctx: Progressive tax withheld by employer — Income Tax Ordinance

tax_credit_points.ctx: Monthly tax credit per point (approx. 242 NIS/month in 2026)

bituach_leumi.ctx: Israeli social security — both employee and employer contributions

bituach_leumi_employee.ctx: Employee share — 0.4% below 60% avg wage, 7% above

bituach_leumi_employer.ctx: Employer share — 3.55% below 60% avg wage, 7.6% above

health_tax.ctx: 3.1% below 60% avg wage, 5% above — paid to BL alongside NI

pension_provision.ctx: Mandatory pension fund contributions per 2008 extension order

severance_provision.ctx: Employer 8.33% deposit — considered release §14 if in pension fund

severance_pay.ctx: One month's salary per year of employment — §4 Severance Pay Law

vacation_balance.ctx: Remaining paid vacation days — accrued under Annual Leave Law

vacation_accrual.ctx: Days added per worked month — 12–28 per year by seniority

vacation_used.ctx: Paid vacation days used in period

sick_balance.ctx: Accrued sick days — 1.5 per month, max 90 days

sick_day.ctx: Paid sick day — first day 0%, days 2–3 50%, day 4+ 100%

miluim.ctx: IDF reserve service — paid via BL reimbursement

miluim_compensation.ctx: BL refund to employer for reserve days

paternity_leave.ctx: Up to 8 days — eligibility per BL rules

form_106.ctx: Annual employee wage statement issued Jan — basis for tax reconciliation

form_101.ctx: Employee tax declaration — filed annually for credit points and exemptions

form_102.ctx: Monthly employer wage/tax report — filed with Tax Authority

form_126.ctx: Annual reconciliation of employer payroll — aggregated 102 data

form_856.ctx: Annual report of payments to freelancers/contractors (withholding report)

form_857.ctx: Annual report of withholding at source on non-wage payments

tax_reform.ctx: Multi-employer tax reconciliation — filed to avoid double withholding

foreign_worker.ctx: Non-resident employee — special tax rates & reporting rules

contractor_payment.ctx: Non-employee — subject to withholding tax at source

vat.ctx: Top-level: Value Added Tax (ma'am) — governed by VAT Law 5736-1975

vat_rate.ctx: Standard rate — 18% in Israel from Jan 2025

output_vat.ctx: VAT collected on sales — owed to tax authority

input_vat.ctx: VAT paid on purchases — deductible against output VAT

vat_payable.ctx: Output minus input — net amount owed

vat_refund.ctx: Negative balance — excess input VAT returned by tax authority

vat_period.ctx: Monthly or bi-monthly reporting cycle depending on turnover

tax_invoice.ctx: VAT-eligible invoice — must carry business number and VAT amount

receipt_invoice.ctx: Combined invoice + receipt — proves both charge and payment

credit_invoice.ctx: Reduces previously-issued tax invoice — reverses VAT

debit_invoice.ctx: Adds to previously-issued invoice — increases VAT

proforma.ctx: Non-VAT quotation or draft — not a legal document for VAT purposes

receipt.ctx: Evidence of payment — separate from tax invoice

vat_exempt.ctx: Transactions not subject to VAT (e.g., exports, certain housing)

vat_zero_rated.ctx: 0% rate but still in scope — input VAT deductible (exports, fruits/veg)

vat_registered.ctx: Osek Murshe — business above threshold that collects VAT

exempt_dealer.ctx: Osek Patur — small business below threshold (120,000 NIS/yr 2026)

pcn_836.ctx: Detailed monthly VAT report — structured file format to Tax Authority

vat_return.ctx: Periodic filing declaring output and input VAT

vat_advance.ctx: Bi-monthly advance payment toward annual VAT liability

reverse_charge.ctx: Buyer accounts for VAT instead of seller — cross-border services

import_vat.ctx: VAT on imported goods — paid at customs, deductible as input

export_zero.ctx: Export of goods/services — VAT at 0% but input deductible

allocation_number.ctx: Invoice allocation number from Tax Authority (required from 2024)

cash_basis.ctx: VAT recognized on payment — for service providers under threshold

accrual_basis.ctx: VAT recognized on invoice date — default for goods

bank_reconciliation.ctx: Matching internal ledger to bank statement — core accounting control

reconciliation_item.ctx: Single line being reconciled (e.g., an incoming wire)

statement_line.ctx: Single transaction line in bank statement

available_balance.ctx: Usable funds — excludes holds and pending

zahav_transfer.ctx: Real-time gross settlement — Bank of Israel system

masav.ctx: Israeli banking clearing house for batch payments/collections

masav_batch.ctx: Set of payments submitted together to MASAV

direct_debit.ctx: Recurring automatic debit — authorized by payer

bounced_check.ctx: Dishonored check — insufficient funds or stop payment

postdated_check.ctx: Check with future date — common for commercial payments

card_clearing.ctx: Processing of card transactions by clearing house

merchant_fee.ctx: Fee charged by card processor to merchant

interest.ctx: Cost of borrowing or return on deposit

early_repayment.ctx: Paying loan ahead of schedule — may incur penalty

linked_to_index.ctx: Amount adjusted by CPI (madad) — common in Israeli loans

bank_of_israel_rate.ctx: Official daily reference rate published by BoI

annual_tax.ctx: Top-level: annual tax filings, returns, forms, assessments

annual_return.ctx: Annual tax filing — due by May 31 (individual) or 5 months after year-end (company)

tax_year.ctx: Calendar year in Israel — Jan 1 to Dec 31

reporting_year.ctx: Year being reported on the return

form_6111.ctx: Standardized structured business balance sheet & P&L for filing

form_1322.ctx: Company reconciliation between accounting profit and tax

advance_tax.ctx: Monthly advance payments toward annual income tax — not an 'advance payment to supplier'

advance_rate.ctx: Percentage of turnover used to compute advance tax

additional_advance.ctx: Supplementary advance for expenses not yet taxed

assessment.ctx: Final tax determination by assessing officer

self_assessment.ctx: Taxpayer's declared tax on the annual return

assessment_appeal.ctx: Formal objection filed against assessor's determination

capital_gains_tax.ctx: Tax on gains from sale of assets — generally 25% for individuals

withholding_at_source.ctx: Tax withheld by payer on payments to contractors/suppliers

withholding_exemption.ctx: Certificate allowing payer to skip withholding

approved_enterprise.ctx: Entity qualifying for Law for Encouragement of Capital Investments incentives

loss_carryforward.ctx: Prior-year losses offsetting current taxable income

tax_deductible_expense.ctx: Expense allowed to reduce taxable income

non_deductible_expense.ctx: Not allowed for tax purposes (e.g., fines)

depreciation.ctx: Asset cost allocation over useful life

accelerated_depreciation.ctx: Faster write-off — tax incentive for certain investments

amortization.ctx: Spreading intangible asset cost over useful life

trial_balance.ctx: List of all ledger account balances — basis for annual report

balance_sheet.ctx: Statement of assets, liabilities, and equity

income_statement.ctx: Revenue, expenses, and net income statement

cash_flow_statement.ctx: Operating, investing, and financing cash flows

audit_report.ctx: CPA-signed audit opinion — required for companies

purchase_order.ctx: PO — buyer's formal offer to purchase at specified terms

purchase_requisition.ctx: PR — internal request to buy, precedes PO

requisition_approver.ctx: Manager who approves PR before PO is created

rfq.ctx: Formal solicitation of prices from multiple suppliers

rfp.ctx: Broader than RFQ — includes technical & commercial criteria

supplier_onboarding.ctx: Registering a new supplier in system — includes tax validation

supplier_catalog.ctx: List of items offered by supplier with prices

supplier_rating.ctx: Performance score — delivery, quality, price, service

blacklist_supplier.ctx: Supplier blocked from receiving new POs

goods_receipt.ctx: Document confirming physical receipt of goods

partial_delivery.ctx: Only some items from PO delivered

return_to_supplier.ctx: Rejected goods sent back to supplier

quality_inspection.ctx: QC check on received goods before acceptance

supplier_invoice.ctx: Bill from vendor — basis for payment

three_way_match.ctx: Matching PO + GRN + Invoice before payment approval

invoice_approval.ctx: Manager sign-off on invoice for payment

approved_for_payment.ctx: Invoice passed all checks and is queued for disbursement

payment_terms.ctx: When payment is due (e.g., Net 30, Net 45, Shotef+30)

net_30.ctx: Payment due 30 days from invoice date

shotef_plus_30.ctx: Common Israeli term — end of invoice month plus 30 days

shotef_plus_60.ctx: End of invoice month plus 60 days

advance_payment.ctx: Prepayment to supplier before delivery — NOT tax advance

payment_run.ctx: Batch payment process — typically weekly or monthly

payment_instruction.ctx: Authorized payment order sent to bank

discount_for_early_payment.ctx: Reduction offered for paying before due date (e.g., 2/10 Net 30)

regulation.ctx: Subordinate legislation — enacted by ministry or authority

ordinance.ctx: Pre-state or emergency legislation (e.g., Income Tax Ordinance)

directive.ctx: Guidance from regulator — not primary legislation

ruling.ctx: Pre-ruling on specific transaction from Tax Authority

enforcement.ctx: Action taken by regulator against violations

finance_ministry.ctx: Government ministry responsible for fiscal policy

audit_trail.ctx: Immutable record of all changes — required for tax and SOX

internal_control.ctx: Process to ensure reliability of reporting

segregation_of_duties.ctx: SOD — no single person controls full transaction flow

data_retention.ctx: Minimum retention period — 7 years for tax records

gdpr.ctx: EU General Data Protection Regulation — applicable when processing EU data

privacy_law.ctx: Israeli privacy law — Tikun 13 in effect 2025

dpo.ctx: Required role for large data processors

risk_register.ctx: List of identified risks and mitigations
